prompt: Generate a high-density infographic poster with the theme "Detailed Analysis of GitHub Project Name/Link". [Basic Info] Name: Project Name, Core function: One sentence explaining the problem solved, Tech stack: e.g., Next.js, React, Python, Type: Tool/UI/SaaS/AI. [Style] Modern minimalist UI + technical infographic style. Soft light background (cream/light gray). Low-saturation colors (blue/green/purple). Flat illustration + icons. High density but clear hierarchy. [Structure] Modules for: What it is, Core Features (4-6 points), Tech Highlights (SSR/Performance), How to Use, Use Cases, Pros & Cons. [Visuals] Card-style layout (Notion/Linear style), clear partitions, use icons like ⚙️ 🚀 📦, bold key info. [Output] All in Chinese, concise and rhythmic, no large text blocks.
